entities.name: PHAEIOISARIOPSIS PERSONATA
entities.description: Causal agent of late leaf spot disease of groundnut

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The host crop affected by late leaf spot disease

entities.name: LATE LEAF SPOT DISEASE
entities.description: Disease caused by P. personata in groundnut

entities.name: INTERMITTENT WETNESS
entities.description: Alternate wet and dry periods that enhance infection efficiency

entities.name: CONTINUOUS WETNESS
entities.description: Constant wetness that results in fewer stomatal penetrations

entities.name: GERM-TUBE GROWTH
entities.description: The growth and branching of germ tubes from conidia

entities.name: TROPIC GROWTH
entities.description: Directional growth of germ tubes and branches towards stomata

entities.name: STOMATA
entities.description: Leaf pores used by the pathogen for penetration

entities.name: PENETRATION
entities.description: The process of the pathogen entering the leaf through stomata

entities.name: LESIONS
entities.description: Resultant marks on the leaf following successful penetration

entities.name: SPORE LOAD
entities.description: The concentration of conidia per unit area of the leaf
